name: propelauth-py
documentation:
# PropelAuth Python SDK

A python library for managing authentication, backed by [PropelAuth](https://www.propelauth.com/?utm_campaign=github-python). [PropelAuth](https://www.propelauth.com?ref=github) makes it easy to add authentication and authorization to your B2B/multi-tenant application. Your frontend gets a beautiful, safe, and customizable login screen. Your backend gets easy authorization with just a few lines of code. You get an easy-to-use dashboard to config and manage everything. ## Documentation - Full reference this library is [here](https://docs.propelauth.com/reference/backend-apis/python) - Getting started guides for PropelAuth are [here](https://docs.propelauth.com/) ## Questions? Feel free to reach out at support@propelauth.com

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.OrgMemberInfo.user_is_role
documentation: returns true if the user is the role

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.OrgMemberInfo.user_is_at_least_role
documentation: returns true if the user can act as the role

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.OrgMemberInfo.user_has_permission
documentation: returns true if user has the permission

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.OrgMemberInfo.user_has_all_permissions
documentation: returns true if user has all the permissions listed

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.is_impersonated
documentation: Returns true if the user is impersonated

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.get_active_org
documentation: Returns the active org member info, if the user has an active org.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.get_active_org_id
documentation: Returns the active org id, if the user has an active org.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.get_org
documentation: Returns the org member info for the org_id, if the user is in the org.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.get_org_by_name
documentation: Returns the org member info for the org_name, if the user is in the org.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.get_user_property
documentation: Returns the user property value, if it exists.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.get_orgs
documentation: Returns the orgs the user is in.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.is_role_in_org
documentation: Returns true if the user is the role in the org.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.is_at_least_role_in_org
documentation: Returns true if the user is at least the role in the org.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.has_permission_in_org
documentation: Returns true if the user has the permission in the org.

methods.name: propelauth_py.user.User.has_all_permissions_in_org
documentation: Returns true if the user has all the permissions in the org.
